<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es-MX">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Mayan Prints — Taller de Impresión DTF, Vinil y Lona</title>
<meta name="description" content="Mayan Prints: taller de impresión especializado en DTF, vinil adherible, corte de vinil textil y lona de gran formato en México. Cotiza por WhatsApp y recibe tu pieza con acabado profesional.">
<meta name="robots" content="index, follow">
<meta property="og:title" content="Mayan Prints — Taller de Impresión">
<meta property="og:description" content="DTF, vinil y lona con calidad de taller. Cotiza tu proyecto hoy mismo.">
<meta property="og:type" content="business.business">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#0a0a0a">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "LocalBusiness",
  "name": "Mayan Prints",
  "description": "Taller de impresión especializado en DTF, vinil y lona de gran formato.",
  "telephone": "+52 999 164 0407",
  "email": "mayanprints@gmail.com",
  "areaServed": "MX"
}
</script>
<style>
  :root{
    --black: #0a0a0a;
    --cyan: #00AEEF;
    --magenta: #EC008C;
    --yellow: #FFE800;
    --paper: #f4f4f2;
    --line: rgba(255,255,255,.14);
    --text-dim: rgba(244,244,242,.62);
  }

  *{ margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }


  body{
    background:var(--black);
    color:var(--paper);
    font-family:'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  }

  a{ color:inherit; text-decoration:none; }

  html{ scroll-behavior:smooth; }
  body{ overflow-x:hidden; }

  .eyebrow{
    font-family:'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size:.72rem;
    letter-spacing:.28em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--cyan);
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:.6rem;
  }
  .eyebrow::before{
    content:'';
    width:22px; height:1px;
    background:var(--cyan);
    display:inline-block;
  }

  h1,h2{
    font-family:'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    letter-spacing:.01em;
    line-height:.92;
    font-weight:400;
  }

  /* ---------- Reg mark scroll tracker (signature element) ---------- */
  #reg-tracker{
    position:fixed;
    right:22px; top:50%;
    transform:translateY(-50%);
    z-index:500;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column;
    align-items:center;
    gap:14px;
    pointer-events:none;
  }
  .reg-dot{
    width:9px; height:9px;
    border-radius:50%;
    border:1px solid rgba(244,244,242,.35);
    position:relative;
    transition:border-color .3s, background .3s, transform .3s;
  }
  .reg-dot::before,.reg-dot::after{
    content:'';
    position:absolute;
    background:rgba(244,244,242,.25);
  }
  .reg-dot::before{ width:1px; height:16px; left:50%; top:50%; transform:translate(-50%,-50%); }
  .reg-dot::after{ height:1px; width:16px; left:50%; top:50%; transform:translate(-50%,-50%); }
  .reg-dot.active{
    background:var(--magenta);
    border-color:var(--magenta);
    transform:scale(1.3);
  }
  @media (max-width:760px){ #reg-tracker{ display:none; } }

  /* ---------- Nav ---------- */
  header.top-nav{
    position:fixed; top:0; left:0; right:0;
    z-index:400;
    display:flex; justify-content:flex-end; align-items:center;
    padding:20px clamp(20px,5vw,56px);
    mix-blend-mode:difference;
  }
  .logo-mark{ display:flex; align-items:center; }
  .logo-mark img{ height:30px; width:auto; display:block; }

  nav.links{ display:flex; gap:clamp(16px,3vw,36px); font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:.72rem; letter-spacing:.14em; text-transform:uppercase; }
  nav.links a{ opacity:.8; transition:opacity .2s; }
  nav.links a:hover{ opacity:1; }
  @media (max-width:640px){ nav.links{ display:none; } }

  /* ---------- Stack sections ----------
     Fully JS-driven: each section is fixed to the viewport and its
     entrance + internal content scroll are computed from a single
     source of truth (window.scrollY), never from where a touch/wheel
     gesture happens to land. A tall spacer element below gives the
     page the scroll room these fixed sections need. */
  .stack-section{
    position:fixed;
    top:0; left:0;
    width:100%;
    height:100vh;
    height:100dvh;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    justify-content:flex-start;
    background:var(--black);
    border-top-left-radius:36px;
    border-top-right-radius:36px;
    box-shadow:0 -30px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.6);
    padding:clamp(90px,10vh,140px) clamp(24px,6vw,72px) clamp(60px,8vh,100px);
    overflow:hidden;
    transform:translateY(100%);
    will-change:transform;
  }
  #hero{ transform:translateY(0); justify-content:center; border-radius:0; box-shadow:none; }

  /* explicit ascending stacking order so each section reliably
     paints OVER the previous one as it slides up */
  #hero{ z-index:1; }
  #somos{ z-index:2; }
  #productos{ z-index:3; }
  #contacto{ z-index:4; }

  #scroll-spacer{ position:relative; z-index:0; }

  /* blurred white glows -- "blur de blancos" (soft edge via gradient, no filter = cheap to render) */
  .glow{
    position:absolute;
    border-radius:50%;
    background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(244,244,242,.14), rgba(244,244,242,0) 65%);
    pointer-events:none;
  }

  .section-inner{ position:relative; z-index:2; max-width:1180px; margin:0 auto; width:100%; will-change:transform; }

  /* scroll-reveal: content fades/lifts/scales in once its section is active */
  .reveal{
    opacity:0;
    transform:translateY(46px) scale(.95);
    transition:opacity .8s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1), transform .8s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1);
  }
  .is-active .reveal{ opacity:1; transform:translateY(0) scale(1); }
  .reveal.d1{ transition-delay:.08s; }
  .reveal.d2{ transition-delay:.18s; }
  .reveal.d3{ transition-delay:.28s; }
  .reveal.d4{ transition-delay:.38s; }
  .reveal.d5{ transition-delay:.48s; }
  .reveal.d6{ transition-delay:.58s; }

  /* product cards & FAQ items cascade in from alternating sides for extra life */
  .prod-card.reveal{
    transform:translateY(60px) scale(.88) rotate(-3deg);
    transition:opacity .8s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1), transform .8s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);
  }
  .prod-card:nth-child(even).reveal{ transform:translateY(60px) scale(.88) rotate(3deg); }
  .is-active .prod-card.reveal{ transform:translateY(0) scale(1) rotate(0deg); }
  .faq-item.reveal{ transform:translateX(-24px); }
  .is-active .faq-item.reveal{ transform:translateX(0); }

  /* ---------- Hero ---------- */
  #hero{ align-items:center; }
  #hero .glow.g1{ width:620px; height:620px; top:-220px; right:-160px; }
  #hero .glow.g2{ width:460px; height:460px; bottom:-160px; left:-140px; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0,174,239,.14), transparent 70%); }

  .hero-inner{ display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; text-align:center; gap:26px; }

  .hero-logo{
    width:min(70vw, 640px);
    position:relative;
  }
  .hero-logo::before{
    content:'';
    position:absolute; inset:-60px;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 40%, rgba(0,174,239,.16), transparent 55%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 60%, rgba(236,0,140,.16), transparent 55%);
    z-index:-1;
  }
  .hero-logo img{ width:100%; height:auto; display:block; }

  .hero-sub{
    max-width:560px;
    color:var(--text-dim);
    font-size:clamp(1rem,1.6vw,1.15rem);
  }

  .cta-row{ display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:16px; justify-content:center; }
  .btn{
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
    font-family:'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size:.78rem;
    letter-spacing:.1em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    padding:16px 26px;
    border-radius:999px;
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
    transition:transform .2s ease, box-shadow .3s ease, border-color .3s ease, background .3s ease, color .3s ease;
    -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;
  }
  .btn:active{ transform:scale(.94); }

  /* soft breathing halo so the main CTA feels alive even before you touch it */
  .btn-primary{
    background:var(--paper); color:var(--black);
    animation:btn-breathe 2.6s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes btn-breathe{
    0%,100%{ box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(244,244,242,.28); }
    50%{ box-shadow:0 0 0 12px rgba(244,244,242,0); }
  }
  .btn-primary:hover{ transform:translateY(-3px); }
  .btn-primary:active{ transform:scale(.94); }

  /* diagonal shine sweeping across the pill on a loop */
  .btn-primary::after{
    content:'';
    position:absolute; top:0; left:-60%;
    width:40%; height:100%;
    background:linear-gradient(115deg, transparent, rgba(0,0,0,.16), transparent);
    animation:btn-shine 3.2s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes btn-shine{
    0%{ left:-60%; }
    45%,100%{ left:130%; }
  }

  /* ghost button: fill wipes in from the left instead of just a color fade */
  .btn-ghost{
    border:1px solid var(--line); color:var(--paper);
    z-index:0;
  }
  .btn-ghost::before{
    content:'';
    position:absolute; inset:0;
    background:var(--paper);
    transform:scaleX(0);
    transform-origin:left;
    transition:transform .4s cubic-bezier(.65,0,.35,1);
    z-index:-1;
  }
  .btn-ghost:hover, .btn-ghost:active{ color:var(--black); border-color:var(--paper); }
  .btn-ghost:hover::before, .btn-ghost:active::before{ transform:scaleX(1); }

  .btn-dot{
    width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--magenta);
    animation:dot-pulse 1.6s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes dot-pulse{
    0%,100%{ transform:scale(1); opacity:1; }
    50%{ transform:scale(1.35); opacity:.65; }
  }

  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
    .btn-primary, .btn-primary::after, .btn-dot{ animation:none; }
  }

  .hero-foot{
    position:absolute; bottom:30px; left:clamp(24px,6vw,72px); right:clamp(24px,6vw,72px);
    display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-end;
    font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:.68rem; letter-spacing:.12em; color:var(--text-dim);
    text-transform:uppercase;
  }
  .scroll-cue{ display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:8px; }
  .scroll-cue .bar{ width:1px; height:34px; background:linear-gradient(var(--paper), transparent); animation:pulse-bar 1.8s ease-in-out infinite; }
  @keyframes pulse-bar{ 0%,100%{opacity:.25;} 50%{opacity:1;} }

  /* ---------- Quienes somos ---------- */
  #somos .glow.g1{ width:520px; height:520px; top:-160px; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,232,0,.10), transparent 70%); }

  .somos-grid{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.1fr .9fr; gap:60px; align-items:center; }
  @media (max-width:860px){ .somos-grid{ grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:34px; } }

  h2.section-title{ font-size:clamp(2.4rem,6vw,4.2rem); text-transform:uppercase; margin:14px 0 20px; }
  .lede{ color:var(--text-dim); font-size:clamp(1rem,1.6vw,1.15rem); line-height:1.6; max-width:56ch; }

  .chip-row{ display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:12px; margin-top:26px; }
  .chip{
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:999px;
    padding:10px 18px;
    font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
    font-size:.72rem;
    letter-spacing:.06em;
    color:var(--text-dim);
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
  }
  .chip::before{ content:''; width:6px; height:6px; border-radius:50%; }
  .chip:nth-child(1)::before{ background:var(--cyan); }
  .chip:nth-child(2)::before{ background:var(--magenta); }
  .chip:nth-child(3)::before{ background:var(--yellow); }

  .materials-row{ margin-top:22px; padding-top:20px; border-top:1px solid var(--line); }
  .materials-label{
    font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:.66rem; letter-spacing:.12em;
    color:var(--text-dim); text-transform:uppercase; display:block; margin-bottom:10px;
  }
  .materials-tags{ display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px; }
  .materials-tags span{
    font-size:.78rem; color:var(--paper);
    border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:8px;
    padding:5px 10px;
  }

  .somos-side{ display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:16px; }
  .somos-photo{
    border-radius:20px; overflow:hidden;
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    aspect-ratio:16/10;
  }
  .somos-photo img{ width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; display:block; }

  .somos-panel{
    background:rgba(24,24,24,.7);
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:22px;
    padding:30px;
  }
  .somos-panel .num{ font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif; font-size:3rem; color:var(--cyan); line-height:1; }
  .somos-panel p{ font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:.72rem; letter-spacing:.05em; color:var(--text-dim); margin-top:8px; text-transform:uppercase; }
  .somos-panel .divider{ height:1px; background:var(--line); margin:18px 0; }

  /* ---------- Productos ---------- */
  #productos .glow.g1{ width:600px; height:600px; bottom:-220px; right:-160px; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(236,0,140,.12), transparent 70%); }

  .prod-grid{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); gap:20px; margin-top:32px; }
  @media (max-width:720px){ .prod-grid{ grid-template-columns:1fr; } }

  .prod-card{
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:20px;
    overflow:hidden;
    background:rgba(244,244,242,.03);
    display:flex; flex-direction:column;
    transition:transform .3s ease, border-color .3s ease;
  }
  .prod-card:hover{ transform:translateY(-6px); border-color:rgba(244,244,242,.4); }

  .prod-art{ height:190px; position:relative; overflow:hidden; }
  .prod-art img{ width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; display:block; transition:transform .5s ease; }
  .prod-card:hover .prod-art img{ transform:scale(1.06); }
  .prod-art::after{
    content:'';
    position:absolute; inset:0;
    background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(10,10,10,0) 40%, rgba(10,10,10,.75) 100%);
  }
  .prod-art span.tag{
    position:absolute; top:14px; left:14px;
    font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
    font-size:.66rem; letter-spacing:.1em;
    background:rgba(10,10,10,.75);
    padding:5px 10px; border-radius:999px;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    z-index:2;
  }
  .prod-art .grommet{
    position:absolute; z-index:2;
    width:12px; height:12px; border-radius:50%;
    border:2px solid rgba(244,244,242,.65);
    background:rgba(10,10,10,.6);
  }

  .prod-body{ padding:20px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:9px; flex:1; }
  .prod-body h3{ font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif; font-size:1.6rem; letter-spacing:.02em; text-transform:uppercase; }
  .prod-body p{ color:var(--text-dim); font-size:.9rem; line-height:1.5; }
  .prod-body .ideal{ margin-top:auto; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:.66rem; letter-spacing:.05em; color:var(--paper); text-transform:uppercase; padding-top:9px; border-top:1px solid var(--line); }

  .specs{ list-style:none; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:5px; margin:2px 0; }
  .specs li{ font-size:.82rem; color:var(--text-dim); padding-left:14px; position:relative; }
  .specs li::before{ content:''; position:absolute; left:0; top:.5em; width:5px; height:5px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--cyan); }

  .prod-note{
    margin-top:20px; text-align:center;
    font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:.78rem; letter-spacing:.04em;
    color:var(--text-dim);
  }
  .prod-note a{ color:var(--magenta); border-bottom:1px solid currentColor; }

  /* ---------- Contacto ---------- */
  #contacto{ justify-content:center; }
  #contacto .glow.g1{ width:560px; height:560px; top:-180px; left:-140px; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0,174,239,.14), transparent 70%); }

  .contact-grid{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.2fr .8fr; gap:44px; }
  @media (max-width:860px){ .contact-grid{ grid-template-columns:1fr; } }

  .contact-actions{ display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:14px; margin-top:26px; max-width:420px; }
  .contact-line{
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:16px;
    padding:16px 20px;
    transition:border-color .25s, background .25s;
  }
  .contact-line:hover{ border-color:var(--paper); background:rgba(244,244,242,.04); }
  .contact-line .label{ font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:.66rem; letter-spacing:.12em; color:var(--text-dim); text-transform:uppercase; display:block; margin-bottom:4px; }
  .contact-line .value{ font-family:'Space Grotesk'; font-size:1.05rem; font-weight:600; }
  .contact-line .arrow{ font-size:1.3rem; color:var(--cyan); }

  .contact-card{
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:20px;
    padding:26px;
    background:rgba(24,24,24,.7);
    align-self:start;
    margin-top:26px;
  }
  .contact-card h4{ font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif; font-size:1.4rem; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:10px; }
  .contact-card ul{ list-style:none; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:8px; }
  .contact-card li{ font-size:.85rem; color:var(--text-dim); display:flex; gap:10px; }
  .contact-card li::before{ content:'—'; color:var(--magenta); }

  .contact-form{
    margin-top:34px;
    max-width:720px;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:16px;
  }
  .form-grid{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:16px; }
  @media (max-width:640px){ .form-grid{ grid-template-columns:1fr; } }
  .field{ display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:7px; }
  .field label{
    font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:.66rem; letter-spacing:.1em;
    color:var(--text-dim); text-transform:uppercase;
  }
  .field input, .field textarea{
    background:rgba(244,244,242,.04);
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:12px;
    padding:13px 16px;
    color:var(--paper);
    font-family:'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
    font-size:.92rem;
    resize:vertical;
    transition:border-color .2s, background .2s;
  }
  .field input::placeholder, .field textarea::placeholder{ color:rgba(244,244,242,.32); }
  .field input:focus, .field textarea:focus{
    outline:none; border-color:var(--cyan); background:rgba(244,244,242,.07);
  }
  .contact-form .btn{ align-self:flex-start; border:none; cursor:pointer; }

  .faq{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:18px; margin-top:34px; }
  @media (max-width:860px){ .faq{ grid-template-columns:1fr; } }
  .faq-item{ border-top:1px solid var(--line); padding-top:14px; }
  .faq-item h5{ font-family:'Space Grotesk'; font-size:.92rem; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:6px; }
  .faq-item p{ font-size:.82rem; color:var(--text-dim); line-height:1.5; }

  footer{
    margin-top:40px;
    padding-top:18px;
    border-top:1px solid var(--line);
    display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:space-between; gap:10px;
    font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:.66rem; letter-spacing:.08em;
    color:var(--text-dim); text-transform:uppercase;
  }

  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
    html{ scroll-behavior:auto; }
    .scroll-cue .bar{ animation:none; }
    .reveal{ opacity:1; transform:none; transition:none; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="reg-tracker">
  <div class="reg-dot" data-target="hero"></div>
  <div class="reg-dot" data-target="somos"></div>
  <div class="reg-dot" data-target="productos"></div>
  <div class="reg-dot" data-target="contacto"></div>
</div>

<header class="top-nav">
  <nav class="links">
    <a href="#somos">Quiénes somos</a>
    <a href="#productos">Productos</a>
    <a href="#contacto">Contacto</a>
  </nav>
</header>

<main>

  <section class="stack-section" id="hero">
    <div class="glow g1"></div>
    <div class="glow g2"></div>
    <div class="section-inner hero-inner">
      <span class="eyebrow reveal">Taller de impresión — DTF · Vinil · Lona</span>
      <div class="hero-logo reveal d1">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Mayan Prints">
      </div>
      <p class="hero-sub reveal d2">Convertimos tus ideas en piezas que se tocan, se pegan y se lucen. Producción a la medida, colores exactos y entregas que llegan cuando prometemos.</p>
      <div class="cta-row reveal d3">
        <a class="btn btn-primary" href="https://wa.me/529991640407?text=Hola%20Mayan%20Prints%2C%20quiero%20cotizar%20un%20proyecto" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
          <span class="btn-dot"></span> Cotiza por WhatsApp
        </a>
        <a class="btn btn-ghost" href="#productos">Ver productos</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-foot">
      <span>Hecho a mano, taller mexicano</span>
      <span class="scroll-cue"><span class="bar"></span></span>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="stack-section" id="somos">
    <div class="glow g1"></div>
    <div class="section-inner">
      <div class="somos-grid">
        <div>
          <span class="eyebrow reveal">Quiénes somos</span>
          <h2 class="section-title reveal d1">Impresión con oficio,<br>no en serie</h2>
          <p class="lede reveal d2">Mayan Prints es un taller de impresión mexicano especializado en DTF, vinil adherible, corte de vinil textil y lona de gran formato. Cada pieza se produce a la medida, cuidando color, acabado y tiempos de entrega — trabajamos con marcas, negocios y creadores que necesitan calidad consistente, sin pedir mínimos imposibles.</p>
          <div class="chip-row reveal d3">
            <span class="chip">Color a medida</span>
            <span class="chip">Entregas puntuales</span>
            <span class="chip">Piezas únicas y por volumen</span>
          </div>
          <div class="materials-row reveal d3">
            <span class="materials-label">Trabajamos con:</span>
            <div class="materials-tags">
              <span>Algodón</span><span>Poliéster</span><span>Mezclas</span>
              <span>Vinil adherible</span><span>Corte de vinil</span><span>Lona banner</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="somos-panel reveal d2">
          <div class="num">01</div>
          <p>Recibimos tu diseño o te ayudamos a prepararlo</p>
          <div class="divider"></div>
          <div class="num">02</div>
          <p>Producimos en taller con control de color</p>
          <div class="divider"></div>
          <div class="num">03</div>
          <p>Entregamos listo para aplicar o instalar</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="stack-section" id="productos">
    <div class="glow g1"></div>
    <div class="section-inner">
      <span class="eyebrow reveal">Nuestros productos</span>
      <h2 class="section-title reveal d1">Cuatro técnicas,<br>un mismo cuidado</h2>

      <div class="prod-grid">
        <article class="prod-card reveal d2">
          <div class="prod-art"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Playera con estampado DTF a color"><span class="tag">DTF</span></div>
          <div class="prod-body">
            <h3>Transferencias DTF</h3>
            <p>Impresión full color sobre film para transferir a playeras, gorras y textil en general. Colores vivos, detalle fino y resistencia al lavado, incluso sobre telas oscuras.</p>
            <ul class="specs">
              <li>Algodón, poliéster y mezclas</li>
              <li>Tacto suave, no se cuartea</li>
              <li>Piezas sueltas o por metro</li>
            </ul>
            <span class="ideal">Ideal para: prendas personalizadas, marcas de ropa, merch</span>
          </div>
        </article>

        <article class="prod-card reveal d3">
          <div class="prod-art"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Calcomanía de vinil aplicada en vehículo"><span class="tag">Vinil adherible</span></div>
          <div class="prod-body">
            <h3>Vinil adherible</h3>
            <p>Calcomanías y gráficos autoadheribles para vehículos, vidrios, paredes y señalización, con alta durabilidad para exteriores.</p>
            <ul class="specs">
              <li>Corte de precisión a la medida</li>
              <li>Resistente a intemperie y rayos UV</li>
              <li>Aplicación en vehículos, vidrio y pared</li>
            </ul>
            <span class="ideal">Ideal para: rotulación vehicular, escaparates, señalética</span>
          </div>
        </article>

        <article class="prod-card reveal d4">
          <div class="prod-art"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Corte de vinil textil a mano en el taller"><span class="tag">Corte de vinil</span></div>
          <div class="prod-body">
            <h3>Corte de vinil textil</h3>
            <p>Vinil de corte para personalizar playeras y prendas, pieza por pieza, con acabado preciso y colores sólidos.</p>
            <ul class="specs">
              <li>Colores sólidos y acabados especiales</li>
              <li>Ideal para números y nombres</li>
              <li>Aplicación con plancha térmica</li>
            </ul>
            <span class="ideal">Ideal para: uniformes, equipos deportivos, playeras</span>
          </div>
        </article>

        <article class="prod-card reveal d5">
          <div class="prod-art">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Lona publicitaria con ojillos">
            <span class="tag">Lona</span>
            <span class="grommet" style="top:14px;left:14px;"></span>
            <span class="grommet" style="top:14px;right:14px;"></span>
            <span class="grommet" style="bottom:14px;left:14px;"></span>
            <span class="grommet" style="bottom:14px;right:14px;"></span>
          </div>
          <div class="prod-body">
            <h3>Lonas publicitarias</h3>
            <p>Impresión de gran formato para exteriores: espectaculares, banners y anuncios resistentes a la intemperie, con ojillos listos para instalar.</p>
            <ul class="specs">
              <li>Resistente a sol y lluvia</li>
              <li>Tamaños grandes a la medida</li>
              <li>Con o sin ojillos, lista para colgar</li>
            </ul>
            <span class="ideal">Ideal para: espectaculares, eventos, fachadas</span>
          </div>
        </article>
      </div>
      <p class="prod-note reveal d6">¿No sabes qué técnica necesitas? <a href="https://wa.me/529991640407?text=Hola%20Mayan%20Prints%2C%20no%20s%C3%A9%20qu%C3%A9%20t%C3%A9cnica%20necesito%2C%20%C2%BFme%20pueden%20orientar%3F" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Escríbenos y te orientamos sin compromiso →</a></p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="stack-section" id="contacto">
    <div class="glow g1"></div>
    <div class="section-inner">
      <span class="eyebrow reveal">Contacto</span>
      <h2 class="section-title reveal d1">Hablemos de<br>tu proyecto</h2>
      <p class="lede reveal d2">Cuéntanos qué necesitas imprimir — DTF, vinil o lona — y te mandamos cotización el mismo día.</p>

      <div class="contact-grid reveal d3">
        <div class="contact-actions">
          <a class="contact-line" href="https://wa.me/529991640407?text=Hola%20Mayan%20Prints%2C%20quiero%20cotizar%20un%20proyecto" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
            <span>
              <span class="label">WhatsApp</span>
              <span class="value">999 164 0407</span>
            </span>
            <span class="arrow">↗</span>
          </a>
          <a class="contact-line" href="mailto:mayanprints@gmail.com">
            <span>
              <span class="label">Correo</span>
              <span class="value">mayanprints@gmail.com</span>
            </span>
            <span class="arrow">↗</span>
          </a>
        </div>

        <div class="contact-card">
          <h4>Antes de escribir</h4>
          <ul>
            <li>Ten a la mano tu diseño o idea de referencia</li>
            <li>Indícanos cantidad y material</li>
            <li>Cuéntanos la fecha en que lo necesitas</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>

      <form class="contact-form reveal d3" action="https://formsubmit.co/mayanprints@gmail.com" method="POST">
        <input type="hidden" name="_subject" value="Nuevo mensaje desde Mayan Prints">
        <input type="hidden" name="_template" value="table">
        <input type="hidden" name="_captcha" value="false">
        <input type="text" name="_honey" style="display:none" tabindex="-1" autocomplete="off">

        <div class="form-grid">
          <div class="field">
            <label for="f-name">Nombre</label>
            <input id="f-name" type="text" name="Nombre" required placeholder="¿Cómo te llamas?">
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label for="f-contact">Correo o WhatsApp</label>
            <input id="f-contact" type="text" name="_replyto" required placeholder="Para responderte">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="f-msg">Cuéntanos tu proyecto</label>
          <textarea id="f-msg" name="Mensaje" rows="4" required placeholder="Qué quieres imprimir, cantidad, material, fecha estimada..."></textarea>
        </div>
        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">
          <span class="btn-dot"></span> Enviar mensaje
        </button>
      </form>

      <div class="faq">
        <div class="faq-item reveal d3">
          <h5>¿Cuánto tarda mi pedido?</h5>
          <p>Depende de la técnica y la cantidad. En cuanto revisamos tu proyecto te damos un tiempo estimado real.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="faq-item reveal d4">
          <h5>¿Tienen pedido mínimo?</h5>
          <p>Hacemos piezas únicas y por volumen — sin pedir mínimos imposibles.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="faq-item reveal d5">
          <h5>¿Cómo les mando mi diseño?</h5>
          <p>Por WhatsApp o correo, en el formato que tengas. Si no tienes uno, te ayudamos a prepararlo.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <footer>
        <span>© <span id="year"></span> Mayan Prints — Taller de impresión DTF, vinil y lona</span>
        <span>México</span>
      </footer>
    </div>
  </section>

</main>

<div id="scroll-spacer"></div>

<script>
  document.getElementById('year').textContent = new Date().getFullYear();

  const dots = document.querySelectorAll('.reg-dot');
  const sections = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.stack-section'));
  const spacer = document.getElementById('scroll-spacer');
  const dotMap = {};
  dots.forEach(d => dotMap[d.dataset.target] = d);

  const ENTER = () => window.innerHeight * 0.9; // scroll distance to slide one section fully over the previous

  let bands = [];
  let activeIndex = -1;

  function measure(){
    const vh = window.innerHeight;
    let cursor = 0;
    bands = sections.map((s, i) => {
      const inner = s.querySelector('.section-inner');
      const padTop = parseFloat(getComputedStyle(s).paddingTop) || 0;
      const padBottom = parseFloat(getComputedStyle(s).paddingBottom) || 0;
      const contentH = inner.scrollHeight + padTop + padBottom;
      const overflow = Math.max(0, contentH - vh);
      let enterStart, enterEnd;
      if(i === 0){
        enterStart = -1; enterEnd = 0;
      } else {
        enterStart = cursor;
        enterEnd = cursor + ENTER();
      }
      const holdEnd = enterEnd + overflow;
      cursor = holdEnd;
      return { enterStart, enterEnd, holdEnd, overflow };
    });
    // scrollY can only ever reach (documentHeight - viewportHeight), so the
    // spacer needs one extra viewport of height on top of the total band
    // distance, or the very last section would never finish entering.
    spacer.style.height = Math.max(cursor + vh, vh) + 'px';
  }

  function render(){
    const y = window.scrollY;
    let current = 0;

    sections.forEach((s, i) => {
      const b = bands[i];
      const inner = s.querySelector('.section-inner');

      let enterProgress;
      if(i === 0){
        enterProgress = 1;
      } else {
        enterProgress = (y - b.enterStart) / (b.enterEnd - b.enterStart);
        enterProgress = Math.min(Math.max(enterProgress, 0), 1);
      }
      s.style.transform = `translateY(${(1 - enterProgress) * 100}%)`;

      let holdProgress = 0;
      if(b.overflow > 0){
        holdProgress = (y - b.enterEnd) / b.overflow;
        holdProgress = Math.min(Math.max(holdProgress, 0), 1);
      }
      inner.style.transform = `translateY(${-holdProgress * b.overflow}px)`;

      if(y >= b.enterStart) current = i;

      if(enterProgress > 0 && !s.classList.contains('is-active')){
        s.classList.add('is-active');
      }
    });

    if(current !== activeIndex){
      activeIndex = current;
      dots.forEach(d => d.classList.remove('active'));
      const dot = dotMap[sections[current].id];
      if(dot) dot.classList.add('active');
    }
  }

  let ticking = false;
  function onScroll(){
    if(!ticking){
      requestAnimationFrame(() => { render(); ticking = false; });
      ticking = true;
    }
  }

  measure();
  render();
  window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });
  window.addEventListener('resize', () => { measure(); render(); });

  // safety net: guarantee content is never stuck invisible, no matter what
  setTimeout(() => {
    sections.forEach(s => s.classList.add('is-active'));
  }, 1500);
</script>

<noscript><style>.reveal{opacity:1!important;transform:none!important;} .stack-section{position:relative!important;transform:none!important;height:auto!important;min-height:100vh!important;}</style></noscript>
</body>
</html>
